message:
feat(fcp-core): add ProvisioningRecipe Display impl + serde-shape pinning test

Implements bead flywheel_connectors-pbfjt ("ProvisioningRecipe Display
+ serde"). Adds a human-readable Display rendering for
fcp_core::provisioning::ProvisioningRecipe and pins both the new
Display contract and the existing serde shape against a representative
fixture.

Production change (crates/fcp-core/src/provisioning.rs):

- New `impl fmt::Display for ProvisioningRecipe` formats a recipe as
  `{id}@{version}: {description} ({n} step|steps)`. Singular vs.
  plural step label is computed from self.steps.len() so single-step
  recipes read naturally. No behavioral change to the recipe model
  itself — strictly an additive trait impl. The implementation reuses
  the existing `fmt` import and ProvisioningRecipe field accessors.

Pinning test (crates/fcp-core/tests/provisioning_recipe_display_serde.rs,
new):

- Builds a representative two-step "github.oauth" recipe via the
  public ProvisioningRecipe::new + .with_step builder so the test
  stays at the API surface, never touching internal fields.
- Pins the Display rendering for both the singular ("1 step") and
  plural ("2 steps") branches, locking the new format string.
- assert_recipe_eq verifies that the recipe round-trips losslessly
  through serde_json (and equality on id/version/description/serde_value
  per leg), pinning the existing on-the-wire shape so the new Display
  impl can't accidentally drift the canonical JSON form.
- Imports the public RecipeId, StepId, ProvisioningStep,
  ProvisioningStepType, ProvisioningRecipe surface — confirming the
  re-exports stay reachable from the crate root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
